item.name: products
item.description: Product management endpoints. Admin routes require {{adminToken}}. Public listing supports pagination and filtering.

formdata.description: JSON string containing all product fields. category must be a valid Collection ObjectId.
Upload one or more product images (jpeg/png/webp). Each file becomes a ProductImage with its position index.

request.description:
**[ADMIN ONLY]** Creates a new product in the catalog. Accepts multipart/form-data.

`data` (required): JSON string with all product fields.
`images` (optional): One or more image files uploaded to Cloudinary.

The `category` field must be a valid Collection ObjectId from `/api/v1/collections/find_all`. Creating a product automatically increments `numberOfProducts` on the linked Collection.

response.name: 201 - Product Created Successfully

formdata.value:
{
  "label": "Chateau Rose Mist",
  "name": "Chateau Rose Mist",
  "category": "683a1f4c2b9e4d001a3e5f10",
  "price": 85.00,
  "description": "A delicate rose mist formulation.",
  "isfeatured": true,
  "isAvailable": true,
  "stock": 100,
  "sizes": ["30ml", "50ml", "100ml"],
  "tags": ["floral", "rose", "mist"]
}

formdata.value: {"name": "Chateau Rose Mist"}

response.name: 401 - Unauthorized (No Token)

query.description: 🗂 COLLECTION FILTER — MongoDB ObjectId of the Collection. Get the ID from GET /api/v1/collections/find_all. Leave empty to return all collections.
true | false — filter by featured flag (homepage highlights etc.)
true | false — defaults to true (only in-stock/available products). Set false to include unavailable items.
Full-text search across name, label, description, and tags
Sort products: price_asc (low to high), price_desc (high to low), oldest

request.description:
**[PUBLIC]** Returns a paginated list of products. All filters are **optional and combinable**.

### Filter Reference

| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `page` | number | `1` | Page number |
| `limit` | number | `10` | Items per page |
| `category` | ObjectId string | — | **Collection filter** — pass the `_id` of a Collection from `GET /api/v1/collections/find_all` |
| `isfeatured` | boolean | — | `true` returns only featured products; `false` returns non-featured |
| `isAvailable` | boolean | `true` | `false` includes out-of-stock/unavailable products |
| `minPrice` | number | — | **Min price filter** — returns products with price >= value |
| `maxPrice` | number | — | **Max price filter** — returns products with price <= value |
| `searchTerm` | string | — | Searches across `name`, `label`, `description`, and `tags` |
| `sortBy` | string | — | **Sorting** — `price_asc` (price low to high), `price_desc` (price high to low), `oldest` (chronological) |

### How to get a Collection ID
1. Call `GET {{localUrl}}/api/v1/collections/find_all`
2. Copy the `id` field from the desired collection
3. Paste it as the `category` query param value here

request.description: **[PUBLIC]** Returns a single product by its MongoDB ObjectId. Includes all associated reviews with reviewer profile info (id, fullname, image).

response.name: 200 - Product Found
404 - Product Not Found

header.description: Bearer JWT token for admin/superadmin only

formdata.description: JSON string with any subset of product fields to update. All fields are optional.
Upload new image files (select multiple in Postman) to replace the product images array.

variable.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the product to update

request.description:
**[ADMIN ONLY]** Partially updates a product. All fields in `data` are optional — include only fields you want to change.

If `category` is changed, `numberOfProducts` on both the old and new Collection will be updated automatically.

Uploading new `images` will replace the existing images array entirely.

response.name: 200 - Product Updated Successfully
404 - Product Not Found

formdata.value: {"price": 90}

header.description: Bearer JWT token for admin/superadmin only

variable.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the product to permanently delete

request.description:
**[ADMIN ONLY]** Permanently deletes a product from the catalog. This action is irreversible.

Automatically decrements `numberOfProducts` on the linked Collection.

response.name: 200 - Product Deleted Successfully
404 - Product Not Found
403 - Forbidden (User Role)
